title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trend Sheet - July 2025
content: In July 2025, credit prices in BC LCFS decreased by 12.65% month-on-month (MoM), dropping from $273.67 in June 2025 to $239.04 in July - significantly lower than the March's peak of $345.09. Year-to-date credit volumes for 2025 increased from 2024, by about 13.97%, and are currently at 915,869. Credit Volumes in July 2025 saw a decrease by 15.2 % compared to June 2025, with volumes dropping from 122,825 in July 2025 to 104,154 in July 2025.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
